notes: Refines the Pathmark Online Dashboard into a calmer executive summary with three equal pillars.
Adds compact week-at-a-glance tiles, prioritised Needs attention cards, and a next useful action prompt.
Simplifies the Spending Plan Assessment into a plain-English money-flow summary with detailed rows kept in setup tabs.
Preserves the v0.6.27 life-dashboard concept while reducing visual clutter and explanatory blocks.
Repository downloads include only the latest Windows package.
release: v0.6.28 Dashboard and finance visual refinement
release_notes: Refines Dashboard and Spending Plan layouts for a calmer, more professional information hierarchy.
